description_for_human: Proposes an ordered, human-approved containment plan for an identity incident. Never executes.
description_for_model: Use ONLY to generate a proposed containment plan for a confirmed or suspected identity compromise. The single function proposeContainmentAction returns an ordered, least-destructive-first plan with each action's automation class and required approver. It performs NO state change. After presenting the plan you must stop; a human DRI approves and a separate audited playbook executes.

functions.name: proposeContainmentAction
functions.description: Return a proposed, approval-gated containment plan for an incident. Proposal only; requiresHumanApproval is always true.

seedEntity.description: UPN, service principal id, or resource id

reasoning.description: Generating a proposed containment plan; no action is taken.

responding.description: Presenting the plan; execution requires human approval.
